rule: Parse time-only strings with Go standard library time package before applying policy checks
Select a named time-only layout parser; supported values are HHMMSS and HHMM
Parse with Go layout 15:04:05 and use this as the default layout
Permit fractional seconds only with HHMMSS layout
Permit time-only input containing an explicit timezone or numeric offset
Do not accept --location for time-only validation
